title: medicago corniculata
intro: Medicago corniculata, also known as buttonclover, is a perennial legume plant that is native to Europe and Asia. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Medicago corniculata include its potential to help with digestive issues, improve kidney function, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
